page.title: Ubik — AI operator workbench for trade operations
meta.description: Ubik unifies inquiries, purchase orders, shipments, approvals, and ERP-ready handoffs for seafood, perishables, and trade operations teams.
hero.h1: From inquiry to approved order, without the tab storm.
hero.lede: Ubik is the AI workspace from Solarpunk Technology for seafood, perishables, and trade teams coordinating through inboxes, spreadsheets, ERPs, and WhatsApp.
hero.meta: Built by Solarpunk Technology · For ops, revenue, and plant-operations teams.
product.lede: Ubik is a single workspace that replaces the daily juggle between email, meeting notes, approval chains, project trackers, and dashboards. It reads across your connected tools (Gmail, Google Calendar, Drive, and others you authorize) and surfaces the work that actually needs you.
card.1.p: A prioritized queue of messages, follow-ups, and approvals — grouped by what's blocking revenue, the plant, or the team today.
card.2.p: Pre-meeting briefs, live note capture, and post-meeting action items that flow directly into the inbox and project trackers.
card.3.p: One queue for purchase, packaging, compliance, and finance approvals — with context pulled from the originating thread.
card.4.p: Lightweight projects and repeatable workflows that wire up the recurring operator motions — RFQs, order tracking, renewals, audits.
card.5.p: Ask anything about your operation. Ubik pulls from your org knowledge, meetings, and files to answer — with citations.
card.6.p: Assign repeatable tasks to Ubik agents — draft replies, prep briefs, chase follow-ups, summarize threads — under your review.
step.1.p: Sign in with Google or Microsoft. Ubik asks only for the scopes it needs to read and draft work for you — you stay in control.
step.2.p: Authorize the tools your team already runs on — email, calendar, documents. Ubik reads the context it needs; it does not move or copy data outside your workspace.
step.3.p: Ubik surfaces what needs you, drafts what it can, and waits for your call on the rest. Every action is logged; nothing ships without your sign-off.
security.p1: Ubik only requests the Google and Microsoft OAuth scopes required to provide the features you enable. We do not sell your data, we do not use it to train third-party models, and you can revoke access at any time from your Google or Microsoft account settings.
security.p2: For the full details on what we collect, why, and how long we keep it, see our Privacy Policy and Terms of Service.
footer.fineprint: © {year} Ubik, a product of Solarpunk Technology. All rights reserved.
cto.h2: Built for CTOs and operators who want fewer tabs, faster decisions.
cto.lede: Ubik starts as a guided try-now flow today, with Razorpay as the planned international payment gateway when checkout turns on.
